overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a magical outdoor classroom pavilion in a wizarding world. Students in dark robes gather around rustic wooden tables under a timber-framed shelter, with a misty forest visible in the background. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the academic atmosphere from a fixed vantage point.

agents.ego_description: standing stationary observing the classroom scene from a fixed position near the back of the pavilion

notable_agents.action: instructor in dark robes gesturing and addressing students near the front table
student in light-colored robes walking from left to right across the pavilion floor

entered.detail: heavy timber-framed roof structure with exposed dark wooden beams and rafters
rustic wooden tables arranged in rows with benches, holding papers and magical equipment
grey stone tile flooring covering the pavilion ground
misty dense forest with tall trees visible through the open sides of the pavilion
dark wooden wall structure at the front of the classroom with a circular emblem

segments.scene_description: The scene depicts a stationary view of an outdoor magical classroom set within a timber-framed pavilion. Students in wizarding robes stand gathered around wooden tables, while an instructor gestures near the front. The stone floor and heavy wooden architecture create a rustic academic atmosphere, with a misty forest visible through the open sides. A student walks across the pavilion floor from left to right during the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze upon a rustic magical classroom that remains poised between the structured shelter of a pavilion and the wildness of a misty forest. It begins with a wide view of students in dark robes gathered around heavy wooden tables, where an instructor gestures to lead the lesson. As the academic activity unfolds, the camera captures the interplay between the solid stone flooring and the open timber frames that reveal the foggy woodland beyond. The scene then shifts in focus as a single student walks across the pavilion floor from left to right, adding a sense of lived-in movement to the otherwise still and scholarly environment.
